hero.description: PhileCoders builds reliable web apps, mobile products, and digital platforms that help businesses scale without the overhead.

services.heading: Services That
services.subheading: End‑to‑end development, from idea to live product. We stick with you through launch and beyond.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Custom web apps and marketing sites built with React, Next.js, and a focus on performance and SEO.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Cross‑platform iOS & Android apps using React Native or Flutter, with smooth native feel.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: User‑centered design from wireframes to high‑fidelity prototypes, validated with real user feedback.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Reliable serverless or containerized backends with REST or GraphQL APIs that scale with your traffic.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: Automated CI/CD pipelines, AWS and GCP infrastructure, and monitoring so your app runs 24/7.

items.title: Performance Tuning
items.description: Site audits, Core Web Vitals optimization, and caching strategies that improve load times and SEO.

about.heading: Small Team,
about.description1: We're a lean team of senior engineers and designers who've worked with both startups and Fortune 500s. We believe in clean code, honest timelines, and products that solve real problems.
about.description2: We act as your technical co‑founders — no fluff, no unnecessary complexity, just software that works.
highlights: Daily Slack updates (if you want them)

portfolio.heading: Recent
portfolio.subheading: A few examples of what we've built recently. Names and specifics anonymized where requested.

projects.title: PeakMetrics Dashboard
projects.description: Real‑time analytics dashboard with custom charting and role‑based access, handling 2M+ data points daily.

projects.title: CraftCommerce
projects.description: Headless Shopify storefront with custom inventory management and Stripe Connect payments.

projects.title: DocTalk
projects.description: Telehealth app connecting patients with licensed therapists via secure video and chat.

projects.title: FlowSpace
projects.description: Project management tool with Kanban, Gantt, and native Slack integration for remote teams.

projects.title: LearnLoop
projects.description: Corporate learning platform with SCORM compliance, progress badges, and admin dashboard.

projects.title: BiteDash
projects.description: Multi‑restaurant food ordering app with live GPS tracking and loyalty points.

items.name: Jamie Rivera
items.text: PhileCoders didn't just build our dashboard — they helped us rethink the user experience. The performance under heavy load is outstanding. We've already renewed for a second phase.

items.name: Sam Chen
items.text: They brought our Shopify migration from idea to live in under 8 weeks. Communication was clear, and the final site feels lightning fast. Our conversion rate went up 20%.

items.name: Priya K.
items.text: Navigating healthcare compliance while delivering a polished UX is tough. PhileCoders handled it gracefully. Our patient onboarding time dropped by half.

items.name: David Müller
items.text: On‑time, on‑budget, and the codebase is so clean our internal team could pick it up immediately. That handover quality is rare.

items.name: Aisha Al‑Rashid
items.text: The team felt like an extension of our startup. They were proactive, suggested better ways to handle real‑time tracking, and delivered a beautiful app our users love.

contact.heading: Ready to
contact.subheading: Tell us about your project. We typically respond within one business day, often faster.

cta.heading: Prefer a quick call?
cta.text: Most projects start with a free 30‑min discovery chat. No commitment, just honest advice.

form.subjectPlaceholder: What's this about? (e.g., web app, mobile app)

form.successText: We usually reply within a few hours during business days. Talk soon!

footer.tagline: PhileCoders builds fast, maintainable software that moves your business forward. No jargon, no surprises.
